title: TeamsSimplifiedV2
description: A plugin that allows you to create teams, claim chunks, load chunks and disable explosions either for all claimed chunks or on a per chunk basis
body:
This plugin allows for players to:
- Create and manage teams
- Claim chunks
- Prevent explosions in claimed chunks
  - Either for all claimed chunks or on a per chunk basis
- Force-load chunks (Amount configurable in the config)
- Render claimed chunks on bluemap (Configurable in config)
